linting.notes: Linting is run via nox sessions. Use 'nox -s pre-commit' for comprehensive linting including ruff, bandit, and pre-commit hooks. Mypy has known type errors (8 errors in grpc_client.py) that appear to be long-standing issues.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest-mock for mocking. Tests parametrized by ConnectionType (INSECURE, TLS, MTLS). Uses pytest-docker for integration tests.
testing.notes: Tests have two modes: (1) default with mocked backend, (2) real caikit stack with --real-caikit flag. TLS/MTLS tests fail due to expired certificates in tests/fixtures/resources/ssl-certs/. INSECURE tests mostly pass (20 passed, 5 failed). Can run specific connection types with: pytest -k 'INSECURE'

advisory_checks.name: tests-docker (Python 3.11)
advisory_checks.notes: Runs weekly on Monday, uses real caikit-tgis-serving images

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request, push to main, and scheduled (daily for tests.yml, weekly for tests-docker.yml). Coverage reports uploaded to codecov. Matrix builds test Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11 on ubuntu-latest.

build.notes: Version is dynamic, managed by setuptools-scm from git tags. Use 'nox -s build' to build and check distribution with twine. PyTorch is installed from CPU-only wheel index to speed up installation.

conventions.test_naming: Functions named test_* using pytest conventions. Tests parametrized with @pytest.mark.parametrize for multiple connection types.
conventions.import_style: Imports organized by ruff: stdlib, third-party, local. TYPE_CHECKING imports for type hints.
conventions.notes: Source code in src/caikit_nlp_client/. Uses src layout with setuptools packages.find. Excludes examples/ from linting.

lint_commands.notes: Passed after auto-fixing 1 import order issue. Runs ruff, ruff-format, bandit, pyupgrade, trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-toml, check-added-large-files.
Failed with 8 type errors in src/caikit_nlp_client/grpc_client.py related to google.protobuf types. These appear to be existing issues in the codebase.
Found 6 import order issues, all auto-fixable with --fix

test_commands.notes: 86 tests collected: 25 passed, 5 failed, 2 skipped, 54 errors. Failures in INSECURE mode tests. Errors in TLS/MTLS tests due to expired certificates.
27 tests: 20 passed, 5 failed, 2 skipped. Failures in test_request_exception_handling, test_get_text_generation_parameters, test_embedding_tasks, test_sentence_similarity_tasks, test_rerank_tasks

container_recipe.notes: TLS/MTLS tests fail due to expired certificates in tests/fixtures/resources/ssl-certs/ (certificates expired). To run only working tests, use: pytest -k 'INSECURE'. The --real-caikit flag runs tests against actual caikit-tgis-serving containers but requires Docker and downloads ~300MB model.

Pre-commit passed after auto-fixing 1 ruff import order issue. All hooks passed on second run.

validation.summary: Install OK, lint partially OK (pre-commit passed, mypy has 8 errors), tests partially OK (20/25 INSECURE tests passed, TLS/MTLS tests fail due to expired certs)

gaps: Mypy type checking has 8 existing errors in grpc_client.py related to protobuf type handling
TLS/MTLS test fixtures have expired SSL certificates (as of 2026-03-22)

No automated certificate regeneration for test fixtures
